subject: SCIENCE
title: explain how light and sound can be harmful
objective: participate in guided activities to explore and describe some ways to use movement,
introduction: Did you know that science happens all around you, every single day? 🌍 In 'participate in guided activities to explore', you'll discover something amazing about our world. Curiosity ON!
